COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $132.46 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE

REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - JESUS HECTOR OSUNA;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON 11/27/17 TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSUNA, JESUS HECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, JOSE $5,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,825.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $3000.00 AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 (L) IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
